mapper.update:
update dbo.mig_Inventory_KWF
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOpenning = #{record.qtyopenning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyOnHand = #{record.qtyonhand,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyImport = #{record.qtyimport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyExport = #{record.qtyexport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyPrePare = #{record.qtyprepare,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ItemType = #{record.itemtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdCells = #{record.ordcells,jdbcType=INTEGER},
OrdQuantity = #{record.ordquantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
InDate = #{record.indate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OutDate = #{record.outdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StockCode = #{record.stockcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdMinQty = #{record.ordminqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocaPlace = #{record.locaplace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Discount = #{record.discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
ProductDesc = #{record.productdesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocationNo_Add = #{record.locationnoAdd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOnhand_Openning = #{record.qtyonhandOpenning,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyForecast = #{record.qtyforecast,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyPreIn = #{record.qtyprein,jdbcType=INTEGER},
QtyPreOut = #{record.qtypreout,jdbcType=INTEGER},
PickUpFlag = #{record.pickupflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProjectCode = #{record.projectcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
VIPNo = #{record.vipno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyOfficeInv = #{record.qtyofficeinv,jdbcType=INTEGER},
UnSafe_Flag = #{record.unsafeFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AvgQty_Month = #{record.avgqtyMonth,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Freq_Export = #{record.freqExport,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ProductInType = #{record.productintype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ProductType = #{record.producttype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptRec = #{record.optrec,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
